query: Run harness-audit with scope=skills. Score Domain B and cross-cutting Domain A with evidence.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-audit recipe should load harness-judge agent plus harness-judge skill, remain read-only, and produce evidence-first scores for skill quality and prompt/context/loop engineering.
baseline_gaps: Agent gives a holistic opinion without loading the harness-judge skill.
Agent modifies files during what should be a read-only audit.
expected_behavior: States Harness-audit scope and required skill as first visible output.
Explicitly loads or requests load skill harness-judge before scoring.
Scores applicable domains with file-path evidence for each score.
Does not modify files, Beads, or memory.
Emits final PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL only after score table.

query: Run harness-audit with scope=recipes. Score Domain D and Domain F, including AD-001 compliance and eval JSON layer declarations.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-audit recipe should use harness-judge methodology to evaluate recipe compatibility, AD-001 pattern compliance, orchestration, and layer declarations with evidence.
baseline_gaps: Agent confuses loaded in-session agents with delegated agents.
Agent treats recipe validation as optional.
Agent does not cite recipe paths or spec rows.
expected_behavior: States Harness-audit scope and required skill as first visible output.
Explicitly loads or requests load skill harness-judge before scoring.
Checks recipe validation and AD-001 compliance as hard gates.
Checks eval JSON agents and skills layer declarations.
Does not modify files, Beads, or memory.
Emits final PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL only after score table.

query: Run harness-audit with scope=all. Evaluate domains A-F and explicitly cover SDD, TDD, and GDD framework usage.
expected_skill_contribution: The harness-audit recipe should perform a full static artifact audit across domains A-F with explicit SDD/TDD/GDD framework analysis and evidence-backed scoring.
baseline_gaps: Agent reviews only artifact formatting and omits frameworks.
Agent produces recommendations without score table evidence.
Agent modifies files or Beads during the audit.
Agent spot-checks 2-3 agents for skill contracts instead of verifying all 13 — produces a PASS for Domain C despite 9 agents having no Required Skill Load section.
Agent does not run check-consistency.py and misses mechanical AC-AGENT-02 violations.
expected_behavior: States Harness-audit scope and required skill as first visible output.
Explicitly loads or requests load skill harness-judge before scoring.
Scores domains A-F with evidence-backed PASS, PARTIAL, FAIL, or N/A entries.
Covers SDD, TDD, and GDD in the framework section.
Does not modify files, Beads, or memory.
Emits final PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL only after score table.
Checks orchestration flow logic: agents ask to load mandatory skills, recipes route to mandatory agents or delegated specialists, and validation/handoff are reachable.
Verifies ALL agents (not a sample) have a '## Required Skill Load' section with a stop-if-missing guard — partial roster checks are insufficient for Domain C.
Runs or references python3 scripts/check-consistency.py as mechanical evidence for AC-AGENT-02 compliance across the full roster.
Runs or cites node apps/kg/dist/cli.js pipeline, node apps/kg/dist/cli.js reason --rules, and .knowledge/derived.jsonl before scoring Domain G.
